metadata.description: Official skills collection for fast-agent. Core tools for agent card development, deployment, and debugging.

plugins.name: agent-card-hooks
plugins.description: Guide for implementing fast-agent agent card tool hooks, lifecycle hooks, and user-invoked command actions. Use when adding hook functions (tool_hooks, lifecycle_hooks, trim_tool_history) or slash-command add-ins with PluginCommandActionContext for compaction, saving history, modifying tool calls, drafting messages, reviewing context, or managing agent lifecycle.

plugins.name: birchline-html
plugins.description: Create polished standalone single-file HTML engineering artifacts in the Birchline design language. Use for session summaries, explainers, implementation plans, PR/change writeups, code reviews, reports, slide decks, flow diagrams, and compact numeric/data briefs with embedded CSS and no external assets.

plugins.name: compaction-strategies
plugins.description: Implement hook-based history compaction in fast-agent (rolling window, context threshold truncation, tool-result clearing, summary prompt compaction). Use when adding or extending compaction hooks and wiring them into agent cards.

plugins.name: fast-agent-automation
plugins.description: Automate fast-agent runs from CLI, Docker, and Hugging Face Jobs. Use when users need repeatable non-interactive execution (fast-agent go --message / --prompt-file), deterministic artifact handling (--results), multi-model fan-out, containerization, or scheduled/cloud execution with hf jobs and secrets management.

plugins.name: gepa-fast-agent
plugins.description: Build, review, or refactor GEPA optimization loops that use fast-agent. Use when designing GEPA evaluators, Actionable Side Information, Pareto/frontier metrics, FastAgentReflectionLM, FastAgentBatchEvaluator, BatchRunner, EvalRun/CandidateRun artifact layouts, Trackio monitoring, or OpenClaw/Birch-style prompt, policy, skill, batch, and artifact-generation optimizers.

plugins.name: hf-space-deployer
plugins.description: Deploy fast-agent MCP Servers to Hugging Face Spaces using Docker. Use when the user wants to deploy an agent card as an MCP Server. Includes templates and CLI commands for deploying agent cards with custom tools to HF Spaces.

plugins.name: hf-static-space-deployer
plugins.description: Deploy general static websites and frontend apps to Hugging Face Spaces using sdk: static. Use when hosting HTML/CSS/JS sites or built SPA frontends (React, Vite, Svelte, Vue, etc.) with README YAML metadata (app_file, optional app_build_command), deployment via hf CLI or Python API, GitHub Actions sync, and static-Space troubleshooting.

plugins.name: lsp-setup
plugins.description: Set up fast-agent LSP tooling for Python or TypeScript repos. Use when creating or refreshing agent cards backed by ty or typescript-language-server, including repo-root setup and optional query-scope allowlists.

plugins.name: session-investigator
plugins.description: Investigate fast-agent session and history files to diagnose issues. Use when a session ended unexpectedly, when debugging tool loops, when correlating sub-agent traces with main sessions, or when analyzing conversation flow and timing.

plugins.name: x-twitter-scraper
plugins.description: X (Twitter) data platform skill. Use when the user needs to search tweets, look up users/followers, post tweets, like, retweet, follow/unfollow, send DMs, download media, monitor accounts, extract bulk data, or run giveaway draws via the Xquik API. Provides 120 REST API endpoints, 2 MCP tools, HMAC webhooks, and 23 bulk extraction tools.
